channel.title: Vegan Home Cooks
channel.description: Recent content on Vegan Home Cooks

item.title: Okara Nuggets
item.description:
Measurements will be added next time these are made. Here’s a quick summary for now.

Ingredients

  • Wet okara (cooked okara works well, but raw is fine too since these get cooked a lot — if your okara is dry, add any liquid like plant milk, broth, tomato product, etc.)
  • Vital wheat gluten (VWG)
  • Flour
  • Chick’n bouillon (or any bouillon, or whatever spices you want)

Instructions

Make the dough

Use a food processor to blend for 30 seconds or until well combined. The dough should clump up and come away from the walls of the food processor, like seitan.

item.title: Lentil Tempeh
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 2 cups dry brown lentils
  • 1.7-ish liters water (for boiling)
  • 2 tbsp white vinegar
  • 2.5 tsp tempeh starter (Raprima bulk starter — store in the fridge)

Equipment

  • 2 sandwich bags
  • Toothpick (for poking holes in bags)
  • Small kitchen scale
  • Oven with a functioning light (acts as incubator)
  • Large mixing bowl
  • Kitchen towel (for cooling lentils)
  • Strainer
  • Racks
  • Thermometer

Instructions

Step 1 — Cook the lentils

Rinse and cook lentils for 12-13 minutes but NO MORE. Meanwhile poke lots of holes in the sandwich bags w the toothpick.

item.title: Javant's Apple Cakes
item.description:
Ingredients

Cake

  • 1 cup oat flour (for nut free use 1 ¼ cup oat flour and omit the almond flour)
  • ⅓ cup almond flour
  • 1 1/2 tsp baking powder
  • 1 tsp vanilla bean powder (or extract)
  • ½ tsp cinnamon
  • 4-6 pitted Medjool dates
  • 1/3 cup plant milk
  • ⅓ cup apple sauce
  • 1 tbsp apple cider vinegar
  • 2 tbsp cashew butter (Nut Free: Use tahini)

Apple Pie Filling

  • 2 apples, diced small
  • ½ tsp cinnamon
  • 1 tsp vanilla bean powder (or extract)
  • ½ cup water
  • 2 tsp lemon juice

Date Caramel

  • 6 pitted medjool dates
  • ⅓ cup water or plant milk
  • ½ tsp vanilla bean powder (or extract)

Instructions

Preheat the oven to 350F.

item.title: Strawberry Love Muffins
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1.5 cups all-purpose flour
  • 1/2 cup granulated sugar
  • 1 tsp baking powder
  • 1 tsp baking soda
  • 1/4 tsp salt
  • 1/2 cup unsweetened plant milk
  • 1/4 cup lemon juice
  • 1/2 cup olive oil
  • 1 tsp vanilla extract
  • 1 cup fresh strawberries, chopped

Instructions

  1. Preheat oven to 375°F / 190°C
  2. Mix dry ingredients in a large bowl
  3. Mix wet ingredients separately then fold into dry
  4. Fold in strawberries
  5. Fill muffin tin 3/4 full
  6. Bake 20-25 minutes until golden
